text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hm-hmm! ♪ I've got me some training
today! ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
We're about to throw a party. You can join in if
you'd like, Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I—I would... if didn't I have training
today.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Oh... And we even ordered in an extra-large
pizza, too. Welp, if you can't make it, that's fine!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But... it's not like my training starts right this
second. I think I can slot this in...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you're okay on time?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, no problem! C'mon, let's get this party
started!
